decision.question: Treat orchestrator-owned queue items as local backlog rather than missing child repos when downstream repo execution is not implemented yet.
decision.chosen: Changed dispatch behavior so orchestrator queue items are deferred locally instead of logged as missing child repos.
decision.rationale: The loop warned Child repo not found: orchestrator for every local strategic task, creating noise without useful action.

outcome.result: Derived steering backfill captured from the March 28 collaboration thread.
outcome.lesson: A deferred-local state is truer than a fake repo-missing warning.
outcome.follow_up: Use this correction family to weight future orchestration, frontend, and verifier decisions more heavily.
